event.title: FSFE at the Augsburger Linux-Info day 2026, Augsburg, Germany

body.p: Since 2001 the Linux User Group in Augsburg (LUGA) has been celebrating the Augsburger Linux-Info day! The day is filled with talks, workshops and project presentations. For the FSFE it has become a long-standing tradition to be at the Augsburger Linux-Info day with a booth and talks.

The Augsburger Linux-Info day 2026 will be taking place on the 2nd of May from 9:30 till 17:00 o'clock (CEST). The FSFE will be present with a booth where you can get the latest FSFE merch, stickers and posters, as well as with two talks related to the FSFE and it's current activities:

ul.li: Bonnie Mehring will be presenting 'Ein Framework für digitale Souveränität: "Public Money? Public Code!"', from 9:30 till 10:00 as a keynote.
And from 13:15 till 15:00 Bonnie will do a workshop, open for everybody, "How to do a podcast with Free Software"!

body.p: Step by and meet the FSFE at the Augsburger Linux-Info day in Augsburg from the 2. May. There is no registration for the event and it is open for everybody.
